writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe things you enjoy or avoid
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what you enjoy or dislike doing, using verb + V-ing (enjoy/hate/avoid/miss...).
writing.sampleAnswer: I enjoy reading books in my free time. I hate waiting in long queues. I miss living in my hometown. I should avoid wasting too much time.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 2 động từ + V-ing khác nhau
Có ít nhất 1 điều thích và 1 điều không thích

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a problem of size or degree
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a problem, using too + adj and adj + enough.
writing.sampleAnswer: This bag is too heavy for me to carry. He isn't tall enough to reach the shelf. The room is too small for ten people.
checklist: Dùng too + adj đúng vị trí (trước tính từ)
Dùng adj + enough đúng vị trí (sau tính từ)
Có kèm to + V để giải thích kết quả
